### Post by mmchugh.6 on 2008-03-06

I'm a fairly new Ubuntu user, just over a couple of months. I'm having a lot of trouble getting my wireless connection working with Ubuntu, the wired connection works perfectly, however.

I read on another forum that the file /etc/resolv.conf should contain two ip address's, however mine only contains this..


# generated by NetworkManager, do not edit!

search phub.net.cable.rogers.com


nameserver 192.168.0.1
